title: Framework Zero: Terminal Panic Demo
description: You are hurtling through space aboard an industrial freighter. The crew already had their hands full with failing systems. But now there is a new threat on board. Something is hunting you. TERMINAL PANIC is a survival-horror "interactive fiction" text adventure RPG with '80s terminal aesthetics.

title: Surface Doctrine: Crater Demo
description: Immerse yourself in the life of Crater — a unique world whose origins remain an unfathomable mystery to its inhabitants. Explore the fates of entire communities and delve into the minds of individuals as you seek the truth amidst the turmoil and unrest of a fading world.

title: Dino Tendie World Tour Demo
description: Chicken Dino Tendie Pets: Turn-based RPG battle to extinction! Grab fossils, spin the microwave slot machine to hatch your pet, gear it up, and fight in Battle City. I poured my heart & soul into this, hope you love it!

title: The Lost Land Of Bahía Blanca Demo
description: In this visual novel with light RPG elements, you’ll come out of exile to walk into the bloody belly of a vampiric regime once more in search of a past that still haunts you. Embark on a journey inspired by the horrors of the last Argentine civil-military dictatorship.

title: Doppel Hunter Demo
description: Blend in, hunt, and outsmart your friends to be the last person standing. Find the real players among clones called "Doppels" to win. Experience random events that make each round unique. A hilarious local multiplayer challenge perfect for a party! 2-6 Players

title: Crownborne
description: A FULLY ENGLISH-VOICED action-romance visual novel. Pulled from the modern world into a kingdom at war, wield an ancient power, romance four heroines, and steer branching battles where every choice you make reshapes alliances, fights, and which ending you reach.

title: FlowTrak Demo
description: Try the FlowTrak Demo, a desktop time tracking and focus assistant app that automatically records application usage and connects app activity, task focus sessions, and Steam status into a revisitable timeline.

title: Walrus Fly Demo
description: Walrus Fly is an endless on-rails flying game, where you fly through rings! Enjoy combat-free flying, and use resources carefully to hold onto your Ring Streak. Go for as long as you can, but lose your HP and it's game over!

title: The Birdsong Tree Demo
description: A cozy building and light simulation game where you observe birds, create custom birdhouses, and help a living urban tree grow. Balance sound, diversity, and neighbor reactions as you shape a calm, reactive environment.

title: Despair Beneath the Sunless Sky Demo
description: A psychological horror RPG blending dark fantasy and mystery. Explore a relentless open world, confront grotesque horrors in turnbased combat, and make irreversible choices. Uncover deep lore and mysteries visible only to those with discerning eyes.

title: Idle Isekai Mining Demo
description: An Idle mining game where your workers keep mining even when you're away! Hire workers, collect manager waifus to automate your mines and boost production. Dig deeper, build and upgrade your mine shafts to earn more gold. Pump those numbers up!

title: Rail Estate Demo
description: Outbid your rivals in auctions for key railway routes, build and upgrade your tracks to dominate the rail economy. Compete to create the most profitable network, balancing speed, capacity, and maintenance in a dynamic simulation

title: There is no next stop Demo
description: After the announcement "There is no next stop," you are trapped in an endless subway. But you’re not alone—the "GUESTS" are hunting you. Trust the "GUIDES" to survive. Or don't.

title: Banquet of Nausea~纳希亚盛宴 测试版
description: Banquet of Nausea is a dark fantasy RPG made in RPGMaker. You will play as Liya — a girl on an epic quest to find her lost kin. Explore sacred ruins, purge festering abominations, and forge bonds with survivors whose fates lie in your hands.

title: Abjure Demo
description: Win by emptying your hand. Abjure is a roguelike deckbuilder where the 2 of Spades reigns supreme — draft cards, stack relics, and outplay every opponent in a strategic twist on the Big 2 card game.

title: Sime Returns Demo
description: Sime Returns Demo is a introduction to quirky, darkly comedic action-adventure about a fisherman, his cats, and the island that decided it no longer likes him. Rescue your cats from furious villagers, and unravel the mysteries lurking beneath the sunny shores of the Adriatic.

title: DEMON'S REIGN Demo
description: Venture into a dark world ruled by demons, overcome the challenges and defeat the archfiends to gain their power. Explore at your desired order and freely build your character to face impossible battles.

title: Dev Life: Tap & Code Demo
description: In this developer simulator, every press of a button is a line of code, and every click brings you closer to the release of your dream project. Start with simple scripts in the corners of the internet and grow into a true tech giant!

title: Soulspree Demo
description: First-person bullet heaven where your gun is the build. Loot items, slap on modules, snowball in Hell. At some point you stop aiming like it's a shooter. Hordes die faster than they spawn anyway.

title: Onimusha: Way of the Sword DEMO
REQUIRED SYNERGY WORKSHOP: Deja Damnation Demo
description: Play the first 3 chapters of a psychological horror visual novel about a corporate training simulation that remembers your choices. Reality glitches. People fade away. Your decisions escalate the dread.

title: Road to the Grand Master Demo
description: A 3D fighting action game where character can grow both in stats and skills collection to worthy title of the Grand Master. Skills are inspired by different martial arts, and can be combined into chain of attacks while character can still be able to fall back on defense.

title: Wheel Make It Demo
description: One wheelchair. Two players. Infinite chaos. Solo or co-op physics-based game about teamwork, clumsiness, and the unstoppable power of friendship.

title: Guinea Pig Gunner Demo
description: Play as a combat cyborg guinea pig in this run-and-gun 2D action platformer. Use your teleporter gun, and a massive arsenal of weapons to fend off a reptilian invasion.

title: The Last Show Demo
description: A narrative incremental about fireworks that starts as a hobby and becomes an obsession. Grow your arsenal, fire strategically to stack combos, build grand finales, and grow a rabid fanbase. A journey that begins in your backyard and ends somewhere you didn't expect.

title: Rayborne Demo
description: Rayborne is a puzzle game built around lasers, physics, and real-time light simulation. Solve handcrafted challenges by shaping light itself while uncovering the mystery behind a questionable AI research facility.

title: Golf-Like Demo
description: Golf-Like is a skill-focused game that reimagines golf mechanics in a minimal yet unforgiving world. Built around precise shots, clear physics, and deliberate decisions. Easy to learn, hard to master.

title: Brainrot Survivor Demo
description: A chaotic survivor-like where absurd “brainrot” creatures clash in fast-paced 20-minute runs. Stack ridiculous builds, unleash tidal power, and break the game with insane synergies.

title: Just A Gun Demo
description: Just A Gun is an incremental point-and-click shooter where you evolve a single weapon through a massive upgrade tree.

title: Black Hole Idle Demo
description: Start as a tiny black hole and grow by consuming space objects. Automate your power, unlock upgrades, and evolve your black hole in this relaxing space idle incremental game.

title: Close Call Extreme - Demo
description: It's Saturday again and you are playing your favorite games on your C64... Close Call Extreme Demo gives you 5 runs of this single player endless racing/dodger with retro vibe and retro challenges. Close call for multiplier, reach milestones for extended time. Wishlist full game for more...

title: No Final Run Demo
description: A quick, skill‑based action game focused on dodging, timing, and survival. Explore a procedurally generated world with infinitely scaling difficulty and compete for the top spot on the global leaderboard.

title: WildRoot Demo
description: A cozy colony sim where survival is gentle—but life is alive. Build, farm, cook, craft and grow your settlement as colonists form relationships, help each other, and shape small, meaningful stories together.

title: Break The Ice Demo
description: Your Safe HavenYou start in a lonely cabin surrounded by endless snow. This is your only safe place to rest and prepare before you step into the freezing caves.Break the IceExplore the dark caves and shatter the ice to find valuable loot. Keep digging and searching to find the hidden Miner's Stone.

title: Sir, We Have an Orc Problem Demo
Planted! Demo
description: Planted! is a horticultural combat party game where gardens are arenas, produce is ammunition, and 1–4 players settle their differences by growing vegetables and throwing them at each other. Because, why not?

title: FC Mafioso: Football Dynasty Manager Demo
description: In this demo version, you can play one full season of FC Mafioso.

title: Rescue Guys - Firefighters Simulator Demo
description: A chaotic open‑city rescue demo where you improvise your way through fires, disasters, and absurd emergencies. No training, no rules — just fast decisions, creative problem‑solving, and a small taste of a city that’s only going to get worse in the full game.

title: Vellar Demo
description: Vellar is a first-person psychological horror game where a family is dead… but the recordings they left behind slowly reveal a version of events that doesn’t match reality. Explore a shifting house filled with impossible rooms, distorted corridors, and uncover a truth that refuses to stay buried.

title: The Anomaly Department Demo
description: Observe. Patrol. Report. Spot anomalies with your team in tense, bite-sized rounds. Wrong votes trigger chaotic punishments and unexpected consequences.

title: Pixel Washer Demo
description: Grab your power washer and scrub pixelated worlds squeaky clean! Play as an adorable piggy, blast away grime, upgrade your gear, and restore a grubby town to its former glory in this cozy, almost zen-like game.

title: 四方行 Demo
description: a traveling merchant crosses the land — trading goods, winning trust. Bargain, craft, and appraise your way from the northern frontier to the southern seas, and forge your own legend on the road.

title: Directors cut: Train Demo
description: Demo version of Directors Cut: Train

title: Sunderborn Demo
description: This is a multiplayer asynchronous sandbox with elements of puzzles, logic games, world exploration, and strategy. Take on the role of the Creator, shaping your own reality out of the surrounding Chaos. Manage your created world and compete with other Gods!

title: Min5 Min - Party Edition Demo
description: "Fast, competitive, and sugar-coated! Min5 Min is designed for those looking for intense action in a short amount of time. Equipped with a variety of characters and powerful weapons, you have a minimum of 5 minutes to survive in this stylized world!"

title: Wink Out Demo
description: Wink Out your rivals in this physics-driven 1v1 shooter! Craft clever card synergies, adapt between rounds, and outplay opponents by sending them flying out of the arena.

title: Spud Keeper Demo
description: Pick up and smash bugs, upgrade your tools to protect your potato patch from escalating waves of pests!

title: 放置斩魔录 Demo
description: 这是一款融合放置挂机、回合制战斗与流派构筑的武侠养成游戏。培养角色、组合技能流派、搭配随机装备与独立装备，在领地经营、副本挑战与试练塔中打造属于你的最强阵容。

title: Merge Hidden 合成寻物 Demo
Hyper Bun Buster: Rocket Hammer Action Demo
BPM Bitcrushed Demo
description: BPM Bitcrushed: A retro roguelite where every shot, dodge, and jump must sync to the beat. Battle through dungeons where enemies attack in time with the music. Find epic loot and even import your own songs to create a custom, rhythm-fuelled soundtrack for your destruction!

title: Shothop Demo
description: SHOTHOP is a violent retro boomer-shooter blending fast-paced movement mechanics with brutal combat. Utilize movement mechanics, cleanse the robot invasion, and restore the portal defense network. Reboot the grid. Survive the shift.

title: Goddess of Strategy Demo
description: Experience the first area of this tactical RPG roguelite. Strengthen your heroes, guide them through a range of encounters, and ultimately confront the area boss, the Sin of Wrath itself. Do you have what it takes to defeat it or will Wrath consume you as well?

title: Astral Throne II: Age of the Phoenix Beta
description: How many times are you willing to die for revenge? Rise from the ashes to uncover a divine conspiracy in this Roguelite Strategy RPG inspired by the classics. Lead an ever-growing team on a continent-spanning quest, fight tactical turn-based battles, and synergize your skills for decisive victory.

title: Promethean Thirst Demo
description: Action combat, mythic equipment form gods, and vampiric thralls collide in this action roguelite. Play through 2 of 5 zones in the early demo and wishlist the full game.

title: Your Painting, Sir Demo
description: A puzzle game about forging paintings using newspaper cutouts. Fool your legally blind boss or lose your job!

title: MeowFactory Demo
description: Welcome to the MEOWFACTORY! Automate production lines and manage limited space to achieve perfection. Connect machines with conveyor lines and minimize hand (well, paw) labour! In the near and depressing future, when the world is on the verge of destruction, ONLY MEOWORKERS can revive production!

title: Food Devils Demo
description: You're the last chef in a post-apocalyptic world. Attract adventurers with monstrous food, make them sign contracts with the Food Devils and organize expeditions to collect wicked ingredients! Customize your characters, build the perfect restaurant and plan every move in this Tactics-RPG Roguelite.

title: Desktop Oasis Demo
description: This is the demo version of *Desktop Oasis*, designed to test performance compatibility and seamless integration with your desktop environment. This demo features a single, 30-minute "Focus Pomodoro" mode; please stay tuned for the full release to unlock the complete experience!

title: Cold Transit Demo
description: Catch your friends hiding in the public transport network, before they manage to disappear. Use bikes, trams, trains and more to move around in the city.

title: Little Ghosties Demo
description: Little Ghosties is a cozy idle desktop companion game where adorable ghosts live inside a glass terrarium on your desktop. Hatch, raise, and collect unique ghosts as they grow from eggs into fully grown adult ghosts.

title: Cat Music Chaos Demo
description: Catch flow state on a 70 BPM timer. You don't need to read notes to play. You might learn by accident. Warning: prolonged exposure to classical music. Side effects include humming Ode to Joy at bus stops.

title: Neurospasm Demo
description: A First Person Roguelike Horde Shooter. Hook your brain into your computer, dive into a game inside a game, unbox and stack unique items, kill weird fleshy enemies, and try the first layer of the game for free

title: Turbo Horizon Demo
description: Drive through a vibrant world of color and chaos, smashing obstacles and chasing distance in a relaxing, physics-driven experience. Customize your environment and master the art of controlled destruction.

title: BOOTH BUTCHER Demo
description: A free playable demo of BOOTH BUTCHER, a PSX slasher set in a grimy 1980s cinema. A hooded maniac, a meat cleaver, and no way out. Coming June 2026.

title: Container Hunter Simulator Demo
description: Salvage lost containers from the depths, uncover their hidden value, and sell them at auction to build your maritime empire.

title: VELATO Demo
description: VELATO is a single-player Poker-Bluff Roguelike Deckbuilder where players build a Joker-driven economy engine, manipulate AI opponents through bluffing, and survive escalating table pressure across each run.

title: Lost Lures Demo
description: Demo of the fishing adventure set in the northern wilderness. Learn fish behavior, read the waters and master your lures. Progress through a skill-based journey of quiet patience. Play solo or join friends online to complete shared missions and fish at your own pace.

title: 魔法少女症候群 Demo
description: 如果魔法少女成为一种职业 需要投简历，面试，签约事务所 每个魔法少女都要穿上战斗服，走进公众的视野 每一场战斗，都会被现场直播 那，怀揣着梦想的少女们，会如何踏上这条充满挑战的路？ 结合多结局文字冒险+2D平台战斗，体验少女从憧憬魔法少女，再到成为魔法少女之后的种种 战斗时沉浸式弹幕系统，模拟现实直播间 五位风格各异的魔法少女，共同串起完整的故事线本作为《魔法少女症候群》试玩版，包含了全作第一章的大部分内容，后续剧情请期待正式版！

title: Warrior's Memory The Hollow Strata Demo
Wheelchair For Two Demo
description: Start a chaotic co-op adventure in one wheelchair. Two players control different sides of the chair and must work together to survive brutal obstacles, dangerous jumps, and physics-based challenges. Play solo, local co-op, or online with a friend — one small mistake can send you both falling down.

title: Mostly Delivered Demo
description: Deliver packages and passengers through a chaotic open world city on two wheels, and try not to crash too much. A free taste of the full arcade courier mayhem: ragdoll passengers, wild physics, and an endless score chasing rush that ends in spectacular wipeouts.

title: A Fighter's Nova: Mindara Demo
description: A Fighter’s Nova: Mindara is a narrative-driven JRPG that fuses character-focused storytelling with the intensity and precision of a true tag-team fighting game.

title: Demra: Rifts of War Demo
description: Classic 90s RTS gameplay mixed with direct hero control and grid-based real-time movement. Command your army and wield powerful light magic to fend off the demon invasion.

title: Growing My Manhole Demo
description: Consume the universe, grow from Manhole to Black Hole in this insatiable incremental game.

title: Tokamak Hand Demo
description: Tokamak Hand is a turn-based monster-taming RPG. Confine wild Thermons within fields, forge bonds of resonance, master diverse builds and battle across a continent teetering on the edge of imbalance. Every capture tips the scales—will you restore order, or unleash chaos?

title: GANA FORCE Demo
description: Gana Force is a Horizontal shooter where you'll unleash powerful firepower, skillfully dodge bullets, and utilize the terrain to maneuver and defeat enemies. Game environments include alien cell levels, scorching sun, space battleships, and more. Powerful bosses and bullet hell challenges await you!

title: Soft(A)ware Demo
description: A surreal puzzle-platformer where you bend gravity, rewind time, and disrupt a virtual prison built to contain you.

title: Space Fleet Logistics Demo
description: Wars are won by logistics. Command the Federation's fleets across a star system, manage supply chains, secure planets, and outmaneuver a relentless AI enemy. Every battle is decided before it begins.

title: Pick Squad Demo
description: A strategy game blending deckbuilding, auto-battler, and roguelike elements. Recruit and upgrade units to build your squad. Draw random numbers to activate matching units’ skills on the board, earn points, and defeat the boss. Test your strategy and arrangement — with a little luck.

title: OFFBEAT Demo
description: OFFBEAT is a music-tycoon game where you build the recording studio of your dreams. Collect and upgrade increasingly strange musical objects, complete jobs for cash, and record real, actual music.

title: 中等生 Demo
description: 这是一部中式校园（高三）为背景的百合向视觉小说。 只要考上大学，一切都会好起来吗？手牵着手，心跳扑通扑通，我们只是朋友吗？大家说只是开个玩笑，感到不舒服是正常的吗？想要挣脱母亲的期待，这是不孝吗？您将跟随主角周语桐，探索青春期的疑惑，帮她作出选择。

title: Sweet Dance Demo
description: A next-gen 3D dress-up rhythm dance game. Mix and match a vast collection of fashionable outfits, master the hottest dance moves, and unlock trending TikTok hits. Meet new friends and embark on a sweet romantic journey!
developer: 上海游牛信息科技有限公司

title: Paddle Together Demo
description: PUSH! PUSH! PUSH! Climb sky-high waterways solo or in co-op, powered by pure pedal strength. Challenging tracks, chaos, and surprises await on your way up.

title: Rituals of Demons Demo
description: A demon-hunting game where you investigate haunted locations, gather evidence to identify the entity, and perform the correct ritual to banish it—before it hunts you.

title: ALIGNMENT Demo
description: a road engineering construction and driving demo. Create roads, adjust horizontal and vertical alignments, add ramps, and generate bridges, tunnels, and slopes from terrain. Then drive your own design and feel how curves, grades, and structures shape the journey.

title: Idle Primes Demo
description: A horror incremental game about clicking prime numbers across expanding grids. Discover new ways to find primes faster, smarter, and weirder. ████████████████████ Belphegor's ██████!

title: The Book of Prosperity Demo
description: A 2D Action RPG set in a surreal pixel-art world where ancient magic seeps through Hong Kong-inspired streets. Pulled into a parallel dimension ruled by the Circle, Cyrus must master rhythmic combat, rooftop parkour, and forbidden truths to uncover the cost of a world built on false prosperity.

title: How To Grow a Black Hole Demo
天机•大唐重构 Demo
description: “STIANJI: TANG RECONSTRUCTION” is a 2D side-view deckbuilding rogue-like set in an alternate late Tang Dynasty. Play as a modern science student, build Physics and Chemistry decks, break enemy armor, read hidden intents, and reshape the fate of Tang.

title: FerryMan Demo
description: Revolt against death itself. Every outcome by the roll of your dice. Sacrifice boons given to you from your crow companion and tip the odds in your favor. Die, grow stronger, unlock more boons, and fight toward the Reaper who bound you to this endless cycle.

title: Komo: A Sunlit Journey - Demo
description: A cozy metaverse chat app where you can relax in a gentle, soothing world. Stroll through beautiful nature or gather around a campfire to chat. Set up chairs and tables or pull out food and drinks at your favorite spot. Spend time alone or with others — enjoy your place at your own pace.

title: Academy of Samsara Demo
description: This is a free demo for Academy of Samsara, not the full game.Reincarnate through a Japanese high-school afterlife where correct answers are your weapon. Explore the courtyard, face six trivia subjects, revisit classmates in relationship scenes, shop at the Spirit Store, and climb to the Final Exam against the Machine Elf.

title: Ouch! Cargo! Demo
description: 4-Player Online Co-op: Cart pushing, loot grabbing, chaotic betrayals, and beast fighting—bring home the value, or you're stuck here! 【Run into any bugs? Let us know! Feel free to drop by for a chat or share your wild ideas. Come join us and let’s be Fishy Friends!】🐟

title: Pinewood Village Demo
description: Relaxing city builder game where you connect tiles to build a cozy village. Place a tile, rotate to find the best alignment, and earn stars for strategic placement.

title: Cards Of Calling Demo
description: This demo includes the first act of Cards of Calling, featuring 1 playable summoner, 3 summonable creatures, elite and boss encounters, and a preview of the card, relic, and event systems. The full game is planned to include additional acts, summons, events, and content.

title: Labyrinth of the Crystal Princess Demo
description: The full version includes the opening sequence through Level 7, as well as the ending and special stages, whereasthe demo version has no save points and allows you to play from the opening through the end of Level 2 in Japanese, English, and Simplified Chinese.

title: Destroy The Moon Demo
description: A cosmic survivors-like where every upgrade brings you closer to becoming a living superweapon. Burn through alien hordes, rupture pocket dimensions, escape black holes, and survive the cosmic war for the Moon.

title: Witness the Dark - Episode 1 - Bloody Burger Demo
description: Experience the first night shift at Billy's Burger. You escaped a serial killer. Now you're hiding, working nights in a small-town diner. But the hallucinations won't stop—and the customers seem to know you. A free demo of the psychological horror narrative.

title: Panic Poopers Demo
description: You desperately need to find a toilet before having an accident! Navigate through a procedurally-generated house, avoid the house hold residents, collect items that aid you, and reach the washroom before you run out of time!

title: A Game About Getting Bigger Demo
Maze 95 Ultimate Demo
description: The maze that hypnotized a generation is back. It was a screensaver. But now? You can finally walk those halls yourself. Or just relax and watch, like the old times.

title: Rattle Spring demo: the crow's room
SCP: Blink Demo
description: Uncover the origins of SCP-173 in the abandoned exclusion zone surrounding Chernobyl. Told through the lens of found footage recordings, explore a hidden facility where Soviet secrets should have remained forgotten.

title: Prowl Demo
description: Prowl is a fast, turn-based roguelite where combat plays out through patterns. Pick an animal. Modify its attacks and movement, manipulate the board, and outplay overwhelming odds one tile at a time.

title: Cargo Runner: Faction Fracture Demo
description: One wrong delivery can start a war. Smuggle cargo through fractured space in a top-down roguelite where Tetris-style packing meets twin-stick combat and three factions are always watching.

title: THE WELL IS NOT EMPTY Demo
description: The well has gone dry. It's up to you to find out why. Traverse through abandoned tunnels. Discover remnants of a ritual never meant to be seen. Power dying machinery to bring light into darkness. Dig into broken earth and crawl your way out. Down here you’re not exploring... you're trespassing.

title: Seal The Breach Demo
description: The Demo for Seal The Breach. A 3D survival experience set within a cramped one-man submarine exploring a hostile ocean trench.

title: Death Kitchen Demo
description: Death Kitchen is a fast-paced online co-op horror cooking game. Coordinate with your friends to serve alien customers who can kill you if you make a mistake. Embrace the chaos and deliver quality with your new intergalactic restaurant chain.

title: Ctrl+Alt+Defeat Zero Humanity Demo
description: A 2D roguelike survivor where robots face absurd human leaders at the end of the world. Waves, builds, epic bosses, and an infinite mode for those who conquer Antarctica. Chaos never felt this good.

title: Entropy Demo
description: Entropy is a tactical turn-based RPG inspired by classic JRPGs. Assemble your party of mercenaries and forge your own path towards an expedition into hell to stop the demonic incursion. Choices you make along the way will determine the fate of your world.

title: SHED Demo
description: Flush your friends. Burn the deck. SHED everything. SHED is a competitive card-shedding game where your goal is simple: get rid of everything before your opponents do.

title: Dark Lessons Demo
description: Trapped in your teacher's home, your only defense against the dark is a flickering candle. Unearth a family’s twisted history and solve puzzles in this Lovecraftian nightmare to find a way out. But be warned: Something else is lurking in the shadows ... and a voice is pleading for your help.

title: Set In Stone Demo
description: Explore a unique level and fight a boss! Get a taste of Set In Stone's platforming and fighting mechanics without getting the main game spoiled. This small sample contains secrets to find and bits of lore, can you find them all?

title: PinRogue Demo
developer: Magnús Andri, Darri Rafn, Daníel Ingvarsson

title: Chrome Survivor Demo
description: Chrome Survivors! the DEMO! Augment your characters, level up, destroy hordes of vile enemies looking to crash the concerts! This is a Demo for Chrome Survivor, a horizontal slice that has no time limit, only a limit on some features as explained in the description.

title: Cold-noodles love story demo
description: demo仅展示序章内容，主要在剧情里引出两位可攻略女主，以及其他配角。可游玩时长大概十五分钟以内。

title: Monkey Wave Demo
description: Monkey Wave is a fast-paced action clicker where you defend your banana stash against waves of hostile apes. Click rapidly to defeat primates and epic bosses in solo, co-op, and PvP modes. Deploy strategic abilities and survive the chaos of the jungle.

title: DarkStone Restoration Demo
description: Darkstone Restoration brings the classic action RPG back to modern PCs with improved stability, compatibility, controls, readability, and quality-of-life improvements — while preserving the spirit of the original game.

title: RobotzZz Demo
description: A robot, after humanity. The beat builds the world. Chase it or fall behind. Chain pickups, build combos, survive three stages of escalating rhythm.

title: Channel 453 Demo
description: A gothic psychological thriller romance visual novel. A man inside the screen calls your name — as if he has been waiting for you.

title: Heroes of the Triangle: Mask Rush Demo
The Sleepless Nights Origins Demo
description: A first-person psychological horror walking simulator. The same rain-soaked corporate street, looping. Notice what's wrong before it notices you back.

title: Mini Sushi Factory Demo
description: Automate your sushi factory assembly line with machines to unlock ingredients and make as many sushi as possible to upgrade your factory.

title: The Doorframe Demo
description: Locked away in a facility far underground lies a mysterious and foreboding doorframe. There is no door, yet remains open a gateway into a familiar place. You are an employee whose job is to enter it, record what lies within, and get out. At least that was the case originally in this Survival Horror.

title: ころコロ 2 Demo
description: corocoro 2! A gyro-exclusive casual game where you tilt the ground to guide 5 uniquely shaped balls to the goal. Overcome obstacles across 50 stages in the full version!

title: Fill The Void Demo
description: Experience the power of BEING a black hole. Consume everything. Grow. Morph between a void that swallows the world and a rolling sphere that bounces, dashes, and wall-jumps across themed diorama levels. Inspired by Katamari Damacy.

title: The Ayna Demo
description: The Ayna is a psychological exploration game set in Türkiye, inspired by the music video aesthetics and lyrical themes of a female vocalist. The player is tasked with noticing anomalies in the concert venue and uncovering the truth.

title: Beyond Yardwork Simulator Demo
description: Head out on your first job and transform a neglected garden. Start up the mower, grab the blower to clear leaves from the paths, and blast the dirty driveway with a pressure washer. Tackle wild weeds, sort the remaining trash, and feel the ultimate satisfaction of perfect order.

title: PigPonyPocalypse Demo
description: A hardcore Boss Rush featuring the best of MMO raiding. Solve the encounter and invent your own tactics to beat brutally difficult bosses. But is your approach truly the most efficient? Compare your performance against others and snatch first place on the Global Damage Leaderboards.

title: Drako: Blood Heist Demo
description: Drako: Blood Heist is an action roguelite set in a world of vampire cats. Hack, mod, farm and fight in a fur-raising attempt to empty the city’s blood banks!

title: Bibidi Bibidi! Demo
description: Bibidi Bibidi! is a wizardcore roguelike deckbuilder where you combine cards in your spellbook to cast unique and powerful spells. Crawl through twisting tunnels and fight maddening monsters to find the perfect build for your wizard. Every turn is a puzzle!

title: Sensory Overload Demo
description: A dropper game designed to overwhelm your senses. Twisting tunnels, psychedelic patterns, and breathing walls assault your sense of balance as the chaos escalates with every level.

title: Silver Pines Demo
description: Silver Pines is a survival horror metroidvania set in small town America. Fight nightmarish terrors and solve puzzles, while carefully managing your scarce resources as you uncover the mysteries that could hold the key to redemption.

title: Tidy Up Demo
description: A peaceful cleaning and organizing game where you explore different locations, collect trash, clean stains, and arrange items to turn mess into perfection.

title: Ballgame Demo
description: Aim, bounce, smash and grind your way through Ballgame, a ballsy physics platformer where you ARE the ball. Compete in challenging tournaments, speed-driven heists, and physics-bending courses where the precision of golf meets the speed of pinball!

title: Rotted - A Brain Rot Simulator Demo
Foosball Manager Demo
description: Foosball Manager is a table football management sim. Scout, sign, and train your squad. Set your tactics, then call the shots from the sideline as your players act on their own across a physics-driven table. Climb the divisions and become a foosball legend.

title: Ball Buster Breakout Demo
description: AIM! FIRE! OBLITERATE! Build chaotic idle combos with your balls in this hyper-kinetic breakout idle game.

title: Corner Arcade Demo
description: Live the dream and run your own arcade in this idle management sim. Purchase arcade machines and build your space, your way. Run your arcade, level up and upgrade your machines to attract elite gamers and watch as they empty their pockets to fill yours! Then sit back & enjoy the buzz of the arcade.

title: Fluff'n'Roll Demo
description: Roll, tilt, and break the rules. Build speed, hit impossible angles, and discover skips that shouldn't exist. Learn the levels, master the momentum, and turn messy attempts into clean runs.

title: Bait Ball Party Demo
description: A real-time billiard brawler for up to 6 players. Play as mini characters to dominate the scoreboard, sabotage your friends with power-ups, and punch them to win.

title: Showrunners Demo
description: A single player, fast paced, speed running platformer focused on building up and maintaining high speeds, performing tricks and mastering the use of movement to achieve the fastest time and greatest score. Find and unlock new movement options to help you escape the gameshow you are trapped in.

title: Dark Watching Chapter 2 Demo
description: After leaving the bunker, you've arrived at the shopping mall, but your sister is still missing. Solve simple puzzles and survive the dangers lurking in the dark...

title: Uraz the Journalist (Demo)
description: Every headline has a cost. Play the demo of a story-rich psychological drama where you decide what the city sees — and watch what it turns you into.

title: LUREFOLD Demo
description: In LUREFOLD, face solo PvE battles. Collect 100+ items to combo your deck. Simple cards trigger huge chain reactions to turn the tide! This poker-roguelike features 5-15 min runs. With randomized loot, every build is a fresh experiment. Embark on a journey of infinite possibilities!

title: Mandate of Heaven : Dynasty Breakout Idle Demo
Rock Diver Demo
description: Land, mine, fill your pack, and head back to your ship. Become a Rock Diver in this incremental adventure as you travel across alien worlds, extract valuable minerals, upgrade your gear, and greet the locals along the way.

title: Armory Crafter Demo
description: Armory Crafter is a modular weapon system that allows you to create weapon models for your games, change their textures, color or size and export them directly to a 3D file format, ready to use in your game or any other 3D project. Free version allows to create swords only.

title: Buerokratie Idler: Germany Demo
description: Try the opening slice of Buerokratie Idler: Germany. Process applications, collect stamps, unlock early upgrades, and see how the administrative machine begins to move.

title: CS Manager Demo
description: CS Manager is a deep and tactical eSports manager game. Make key decisions on rosters, strategies, and practice, and take on your opponents in real time matches. Rise to the top of the circuit in a simulation where every tactical choice matters.

title: Tank Arena Demo
description: Tank Arena is a chaotic top-down multiplayer tank shooter built for fast, explosive battles with friends. Jump into the arena, blast each other with shells, and see who survives the longest.

title: Exark Demo
description: Exark is a run-based engine builder where you command a gigantic ark-ship. Construct buildings, hire crew with unique skills, and exploit powerful synergies to survive your voyage to the rim of the world.

title: Frog Island Demo
description: Start your new life as a caretaker for an island of frogs in this cozy creature-collector! Build your dream island, discover magical wildlife, and uncover the island's many hidden secrets, to try and piece together the past life you've somehow forgotten.

title: Chivalware Demo
description: Chivalware is a frantic tile-matching action roguelite. Challenge your reflexes and coordination in real-time on a grid battlefield: evade attacks, match tiles to charge your weapons, and find the right opportunity to strike.

title: KILLFLOW Demo
description: KILLFLOW is an insanely fast retro-FPS set in a stylish procedurally generating world. Destroy red psychopaths with destructive weapons to save yourself from getting corrupted, and get to the end.

title: Beast Bastion Demo
description: A Roguelike Auto-Chess game Demo. Recruit troops and pair them with defense turrets. Try it now!

title: Fu-Fu-Chan -way up!- Demo
description: Blow into the microphone and breathe life into your climb. As simple as a breath. As deep as the sky.

title: Castles & Castellans Demo
description: Castles & Castellans is a hybrid of real-time strategy and third-person action. Rule from the castle-building RTS view - construct, manage, and fortify against looming threats. Then step into the castellan’s boots in TPP, fighting side by side with your soldiers atop the very walls you built.

title: The Towering Dungeon Demo
description: Fight your way through the levels of the Towering Dungeon. A unique Tower Defense blending exploration, strategy, and RPG elements. Explore, summon your defenses, customize your heroes, and overcome deadly dangers on your ascent toward the greatest secret in the universe!

title: S.E.X. Project: Simulated Emotional Xenotech Demo
Farming Pixels Demo
description: A unique resource gathering game with quests, gambling, tools and a lot of loot. Play the first chapter of the main story and try to reach the highest possible rank - to eventually become the king of the pixels!

title: Rampallians Demo
description: Rampallians blends the resource gathering of strategy games with core card game mechanics from Trading Card Game classics. With an auto battler for combat, in a fantasy setting. Nearly 400 cards available, and future expansions to be free updates. So no pay to win, ever.

title: Unknown Rules Demo
description: Unknown Rules is an independently created multiplayer online horror game that supports 1-4 players.

title: Unknown Horizons Demo
description: Retro styled top-down space exploration adventure where you will meet new alien races, learn their secrets and build their trust to get their help to find a way home.

title: The Last Shot: Underworld Demo
description: The Last Shot: Underworld casts players in the role of an aging scientist who, by a sinister twist of fate, finds himself deep in the dungeons of Metropolis—a place inhabited by victims of monstrous experiments, rogue robots, and other unfortunate souls cast down to the depths.

title: _archive Demo
description: _archive is an experimental software granting access to a fragment of reality beyond time and space. Our system renders this universe from a human perspective. We cannot guarantee what your exploration may uncover. Enjoy the open demo, and feel free to share feedback.

title: QuickShot Demo
description: QuickShot is a thrilling Western rogue-lite styled around an arcade shooting gallery. Defend Tumble Town as you face vile criminals and unique bosses! Discover powerful abilities, make run impacting decisions and keep your head level as you venture forth and brave the desert.

title: The bird of the North Demo
description: In 1921: a kidnapping, a revolution... Investigate and uncover the truth behind a dark, mysterious story.

title: INORIGAMI HACK DOWN Demo
description: A point-and-click horror adventure where you battle evil spirits to escape. You take a part-time job at the "House of Saschibae," a place said to grant happiness through prayer. Instead, This demo allows you to play the first 15-30 minutes of the story.

title: DEMON SIEGE Demo
description: A retro-inspired boomer shooter where every powerup stacks infinitely. Become an unstoppable demon-slaying powerhouse with insane speed, massive jumps, multi-bullet weapons, and game-breaking builds.

title: The Wickers House Demo
description: An atmospheric first-person horror game. You wake up after a road accident. Before you stands a house where you thought you could find help. But this house is a trap for those who dare enter...

title: Zozo and the Lost Dreams Demo
description: Help Zozo find his way home in this cartoon-inspired Metroidvania platformer. Pillow-fight sentient pastries, train under an octopus master, and brave a cybernetic jungle as you explore the vibrant landscapes of Zozo's dreams.

title: STRANGER WITHIN Demo
developer: Great LEE SEUNG YONG - Team E.S

title: Edge3 Demo
description: Try Edge3, a pixel art editor featuring powerful palette management and animation tools.

title: Break Point: Brace & Breach Demo
description: [Hero-Building] + [Frontline Tower Defense]｜Hold against multi-lane assaults｜Adjust positions, facing, skill builds, and formations to create a unique defense｜Push the front, seize resources, and strengthen your heroes｜Let the enemy tide shatter against your masterpiece

title: Deck of Potential Demo
description: Deck of Potential combines roguelike deckbuilder with bullet heaven. Collect cards, fuse them, and slap on sticker upgrades to beat thousands of monsters. Take down dungeon bosses, unlock new character, and discover fusion recipes to build the ultimate auto-firing deck.

title: Asana Demo
description: A sci-fi dark comedy visual novel. Build your stats, navigate branching paths, and argue with N.E.K.O., the ship’s godlike AI in cat form. Live AI conversations with multiple characters shape your path, making every run different. Every choice matters. N.E.K.O. is still not impressed.

title: Tileburg Demo
description: Tileburg is a game where each tile played has direct effects as well as powerful combos that trigger as soon as the conditions are met. Transform the landscape and develop your city while scoring points. Each turn, the city expands on a random tile!

title: Turn Back Now Demo
description: You are Ross Chole, a young detective who responds to a routine call in a quarantined city on the brink of collapse. What begins as a simple investigation quickly spirals into a fight for survival as an unknown outbreak turns ordinary people into something monstrous.

title: Alpha Star Demo
description: [Master the Void, Defy the Gravity]Alpha Star blends classic arcade shoot-'em-up thrills with a dynamic physics-based environment. It's not just about dodging bullets—it's about surviving the space-time distortions of massive black holes that pull everything into their grasp.

title: Silent Shark Demo
description: A tactical WWII submarine sim demo focused on chart-based attacks: track ships by hydrophone and periscope, plot an intercept, estimate range, set up the Torpedo Data Computer, fire torpedoes, and evade escorts through tutorials, standalone encounters, and a limited scenario generator.

title: The Blinking Room Demo
description: One night, young Lily wakes from a nightmare — unaware that her real nightmares are only just beginning. Uncover the secrets hidden behind closed eyes.

title: Harmony Of Tea Demo
description: Small relaxing puzzle game where you need to find the right place for tea on a shelf. Travel from Yunnan Province to Shanghai as a tea courier, exploring charming provinces and discovering unique tea flavors.

title: Valefor 2 Demo
description: A dark-fantasy roguelike autobattler. Recruit mercenaries, stack distinct race/class synergies, forge relics, claim perks. Take all the time you need to theory-craft your formation. Asynchronous PvP: pure strategy at your own pace.

title: The Flesh Beneath Demo
description: A dark-fantasy card-roguelike about giving the cathedral below what it asks for — one piece of yourself at a time. Sever your own flesh for power. Press blood-stones into your cards. Permadeath. Every name is remembered.

title: Loop Miner Demo
description: Loop Miner is a mining incremental game where a cute mole miner endlessly digs through mines, gathers resources, collects artifacts, and ventures deeper underground. Experience the satisfaction of growing stronger through endless mining loops.

title: Hold The Gates Demo
description: Build by day, hold the line by night. A pixel-art roguelite where you build a village, recruit heroes, and watch your formation hold or break against waves of monsters in real-time auto-combat. How long can you hold the gates?

title: ANONYMIZED Demo
description: Play as a digital rat and hack your way into the retro-futuristic grid-based movement puzzle world of Anonymized, where you shift hues and dive layers deep in search of the one true Source Cheese.

title: DEAD BEFORE WORK: THE COMMUTE Demo
description: "20 mins to the meeting, or you’re DEAD BEFORE WORK!" It's Archie's unluckiest day. From broken alarms to a city that’s literally out to get him. Sprint through physics-based chaos, dodge cosmic-level bad luck, and rack up GAG POINTS. Can you survive the world’s most lethal commute?

title: Rangedrifter Demo
description: Get a glimpse of the forbidden world of Rangedrifter in this demo version! Travel a remote path, outsmart deadly traps, overcome monsters and wild animals, gather food and gear, find secrets, and try to reach the end of the path!

title: World Inverted Demo
description: The sky lies beneath our feet.Above stretches a vast plane. From it hang forests of inverted buildings, linked by narrow corridors and pipes. They stand in silence, like upside-down obelisks pointing toward the eye of the sun.This game reveals an upside-down world through words and unique visuals.

title: In The Name Of Fortune Demo
Cubie Demo
description: CUBIE is a minimalist puzzle platformer where you control gravity. Each side of the cube offers unique physics based on how you enter it. The world remains the same – only your perspective changes. Can you solve spatial puzzles in a labyrinth where "up" is just a relative term?

title: Patisserie Simulator Demo
description: Run your own cozy patisserie and grow your fortune! Serve coffee, fresh pastries, and orange juice to customers, unlock new recipes, and decorate your patisserie to make it more charming and profitable.

title: Brix Demo
description: Think it, build it, and watch it break. Brix is a physics-based engineering sandbox where you tackle impossible challenges with your own custom creations. From battlebots to earthquake-proof towers..

title: Delta Demo
description: Delta is a first-person movement-heavy platformer game focused on physics-based traversal, speedrunning, and mechanical mastery. And somewhere ahead, the one you lost is still waiting.

title: Dungeon Potato Demo
description: Dungeon Potato is a fast-paced, top-down action roguelike where your loadout shapes the story. Survive unpredictable encounters, forge unique builds, and battle through a perilous labyrinth. Will you rise as a servant of the Potato God or rebel against it?

title: Dungeon Tells Demo
description: The heroes have escaped their cages. Dungeon Tells is a single-player social deduction game where you can read the minds of your enemies. Execute the weak, charm the strong, and defend your dungeon.

title: Once Upon a Throne of Thorns Demo
description: The demo for the BL visual novel Once Upon a Throne of Thorns.

title: うつらうつらとつつうらうらと Demo
description: Roam a quiet late-night city in this chill point-and-click adventure. Click anything that catches your eye, check your phone, and reply to viewer comments only if you feel like it. Take your time and enjoy a slow, unhurried night—free from anyone’s expectations.

title: Iron Fuse: Field Test Demo
description: Run along walls and grapple around in the machine apocalypse of 3003. Survive against awful machines in this electrifying physics-based movement shooter demo.

title: Hopfinity Demo
description: Grapple to infinity as Hop! Ascend endless caves, castles & skies, dodging explosive Bombarders and enemy turret fire in this pixel-perfect vertical action-platformer! Enjoy this DEMO as the full game nears completion!

title: Decide Your Fate: Prologue
description: Decide Your Fate is a tense psychological horror game about escaping a nightmarish house. You must navigate silently and secure your escape by evading a blind killer.

title: NIGHTMIST Demo
description: Experience a high-fidelity nightmare in the NIGHTMIST Demo, a tactical PvE action-horror game. From a gritty body-cam perspective, navigate a terrifying world cloaked in dense fog. Use stealth, resource management, and tactical precision to outsmart intelligent AI hunting you from the dark.

title: Darklords: Siegefront Demo
description: Pick Human or Demon in a real-time strategy game with twelve units and faction skills per race, custom six-unit armies, and a multi-difficulty campaign. Finish the campaign to unlock Challenge Mode and top your records.

title: Bubble Shooter but In Space and Incremental Demo
description: A short, satisfying incremental game about flying through space, popping bubbles, and harvesting Bubble Matter. Build combos, land skillshots for massive multipliers, and spend your loot in a sprawling upgrade shop.

title: Visual Novel Nodal Editor Demo
description: Demo Version of Visual Novel Nodal Editor.------------ Demo Limitations -------------no executable creationlimited to 10 story nodes

title: Scapewatch: Idle MMO Demo
description: 28 skills. Three combat styles. Clans, raids, hiscores, pets, capes. Set up your queue, close the tab, come back richer. Scapewatch is the idle MMO for people who actually like the grind.

title: Sisyphus Conviction Demo
description: Sisyphus Conviction is a Clicker Game about walking up Mountain, dragging a Rock from the Underworld. Based on the Greek Myth of the King Sisyphus who tried to defy Death. Now doomed for Eternity, join Sisyphus on this adventure with a Click, Upgrade, Repeat system.

title: Crown Siege Demo
description: A short incremental tower defense game centered around growing and strengthening armies, to defend your kingdom and stop endless waves of enemies.

title: Tiles & Vials Demo
description: Merge weapons, shields and potions while moving through a strategic roguelike board battler. Collect 50+ unique artifacts, create game-breaking synergies and outsmart deadly bosses.

title: Habit Puzzles Demo
description: This free demo contains the game's tutorial and 5 jigsaw puzzles to help you decide if you'll enjoy the full Habit Puzzles experience.

title: Act! Autonomy: Cell-Tones Demo
description: Free trial version available! Dive into this rhythm game with fully innovative free-input gameplay — relax, immerse yourself, and tune your unique movement in the ocean of the subconscious.

title: DICEPATH Demo
description: DicePath is a puzzle game where every move costs Action Points. Plan your route, collect dice to stay alive, and reach the exit before you run out. 50 handcrafted levels. One resource. No margin for error.

title: Upmadillo Demo
description: You are an armadillo. You need to go up. Make precise jumps, master the physics, and reach the top without falling. That's it. Good luck.

title: The Twisted Zone Demo
description: A collection of two short stories filled with mystery and confusion.

title: Tribal Trouble: Resurrected Demo
description: The most troublesome RTS returns, free forever. Easy to pick up, tough to put down. Play as Vikings or Natives, build your tribe, and battle across randomly generated islands with up to 12 players online. A community-driven revival of a cult classic. Come cause some trouble!

title: Project Berserk Demo
description: The fight for the future starts now. Fight with or against your friends with crazy sci-fi tech, innovative mechanics, and a classic yet colorful retro feel!

title: Fury of the Axe Demo
description: Play the demo of Fury of the Axe: a brutal action RPG where rage is your only weapon. Fight through a cursed world, break your enemies, and unleash the fury within.

title: Clicker Ore Demo
description: Descend into the depths of the earth, survive against rising heat, discover unique pickaxes, battle dungeon bosses, and become the master of the depths. The game will launch as Free to Play.

title: Center Of The Galaxy: Desktop Idle Demo
description: An idle pixel-art space game. Your ship travels toward the center of the galaxy on its own asteroids get in the way. Break them, upgrade your ship, unlock new ones. Reach the center, and the next universe begins harder than the last.

title: Harvest Looper Demo
description: Harvest plants, unlock upgrades, and expand your farming loop through skill trees, perks, and powerful harvesters. Collect fragments, complete Hidden Book sets, and optimize your incremental growth.

title: Bio Doll Demo
description: Miyuki awakens in a frozen cryo chamber to find the space facility in chaos—blood-smeared walls, blaring alarms, and undead roaming the halls. Alone, she must survive, solve puzzles, and uncover the truth behind a vanished experiment. In this nightmare, every choice matters.

title: Seven Seas Jewels 2 Collector's Edition Demo
description: Set sail into danger, mystery, and dark magic in the Seven Seas Jewels 2 Demo! Play the opening chapter with 16 handcrafted match-3 levels and around 30-40 minutes of gameplay as Polly begins her journey across stormy seas to break Narissa’s curse.

title: 汪里个狼 Wolf in Woof Demo
The Demon King: Harem-DEMO
description: A turn-based Japanese RPG where players take on the role of a demon king to help goblins defeat the human army.

title: Summer Delusion: The Girl Only I Can See Demo
Craft. Sell. Goblin. Repeat. Demo
description: Build and manage your own goblin shop. Craft unique weapons with minigames and negotiate their price! Hire workers to help you run the business! Become the richest merchant in the kingdom!

title: Void Commander: Armada Demo
description: Void Commander: Armada Demo is a fast-paced tactical space combat experience where you command fleets, unlock powerful ships, and battle against the relentless Roa'Khar Swarm.This demo includes:Fleet deployment and tactical battlesMultiple playable shipsUpgrade and unlock systemsEarly campaign progressionNew UI, balance changes, and...

title: Trebuchet Simulator Demo
description: Physics simulator where you control a Trebuchet to launch rocks at castles. Adjust arm length, projectile mass, pivot height, release angle and base angle to maximize damage.

title: 天空之塔 Demo
description: “Tower of the Sky” is a roguelike RPG where every run is a new challenge. Join the ritual ascent, recruit unique allies, and fight through ever-changing floors. Discover hidden secrets behind the three families and the tower that reshapes fate itself.

title: Stip Demo
description: Assign, undo, deduce! Solve a series of minimalist number puzzles. Use constraints to assign numbers to the correct stips. Navigate the interconnected puzzles to uncover secrets. Please ignore any odd Stip behavior.

title: SCROLLBOUND Demo
description: Simple 3-key controls with fast-paced survival combat.Defend an ancient scroll against endless waves of enemies approaching from both sides in this fast-paced roguelite survival defense game. Master powerful skills, adapt your builds, and survive for as long as possible.

title: Dawn of Horror Demo
description: Dawn of Horror is a high-intensity Action Horror FPS set in the decaying urban sprawl of Cygnus City. Following the collapse of civilization into a digital Dark Age, step into the role of Kage—a survivor seeking vengeance against hordes of Cyber-Zombies and bio-mechanical monstrosities.

title: Ambered: Three Thousand Days & Nights DEMO
description: This is a 2D visual novel featuring gang warfare. You play as Ikay Lu, a genius CFO, teaming up with Maple Ye, a ruthless mob boss, to navigate dangers and daily life in Xiji. With over 300 backgrounds and 100 CGs, uncover Yoo-chun Park’s sinister conspiracy and protect your most precious person.

title: Bad Range Demo
description: Skewer them all! Control a spear‑wielding tank in this updated single‑screen arcade-like action game. Line up targets and pierce multiple enemies at once. Conquer each stage with a satisfying, steady challenge. 7 interwoven storylines gradually reveal the truth behind the unfolding incidents.

title: Don Memo Demo
description: Don Memo is a brave bull who embarks on one final journey across Costa Rica to rescue his granddaughter and confront Pisuicas. Fight against legends and shadows of the past in this 2D pixel platformer, while carrying the legacy of a family destined to protect the world from evil.

title: XiaoLuo's English War Demo
description: The town is collapsing! A demonic legion is closing in, and its survival is in your hands. Words are your bullets, and typing speed is your life. Type accurately to unleash lethal skills against waves of enemies. Grab your keyboard and fight to master English and survive!

title: Desktop Planet Demo
description: A desktop idle-style game. Free from constant monster attacks, you can focus purely on construction. Start by mining resources to build bases and factories, then assemble fleets to explore more planets.

title: Between Worlds: challenging puzzles Demo
description: "Between Worlds" is a 2D puzzle game where you reshape the boundary between two intertwined worlds to reach the goal. Turn characters into terrain to create paths, but every change affects both sides of the world. Use logic, shifting gravity, and creative thinking to solve complex puzzles.

title: 夏日重奏 Demo
description: 夏日重奏 is a visual novel RPG in which you play as a seemingly ordinary high school student. In order to reclaim a once-lost dream of music, you will strive to improve yourself, search for teammates, spark new chemistry with your companions, and ultimately decide both your own future and theirs.

title: Neighborhood Video Demo
description: Crack the case of the missing video store employee in this 3D point and click mystery game by solving escape room puzzles, combing the computer database, and stocking shelves as an undercover detective posing as a cashier during your first weekend at the suspiciously understaffed Neighborhood Video.

title: Toy Tycoon Demo
description: You're an owner of toy business. Start your business from a small store in the suburban area. Increase your profit, unlock new toys, hire employees, move to bigger place, and grow your business. At the end you will become a toy tycoon!

title: Triple Chess Demo
description: Triple Chess reimagines classic chess with three stacked boards and vertical movement, creating deeper strategy, new tactics, and thrilling multi-level battles.

title: Golden Magnet: Pilot Episode
description: Grab your crew, grab your supercharged magnet, and get launched. Pull, repel, chain through the air. Get through the mazes and parkours. Fly together or fall together. Win the grand prize of the golden magnet!

title: Hunk Battle Gems Demo
description: Try the opening slice of Hunk Battle Gems. Battle Jax, Mason, and Reed in turn-based match-3 duels, build elemental MP, unlock early relationship rewards, and get a taste of the full roster.

title: Nightborn Demo
description: Fight, sneak, or charm your way through a gothic modern New Orleans as a Vampire detective of your creation. Unravel a vast centuries-old conspiracy involving Vampire factions, Werewolves, and far stranger horrors. Try to survive as a Nightborn without losing yourself to madness or damnation.

title: Band Of Heroes Demo
description: Band of Heroes DemoBand of Heroes es un juego de acción y aventura de fantasía donde explorás un mundo medieval, luchás contra enemigos, conseguís equipo y usás poderes especiales para sobrevivir.En esta demo podés probar una parte del juego mientras seguimos desarrollando la experiencia completa.

title: Monocre Demo
description: White or Black— A world painted in just two colors. Toggle the colors of your character and the blocks to "forge" your path to the goal in this brand-new puzzle experience.

title: Army Air Corps Demo
description: A top‑down arcade shooter with WWII‑inspired aircraft. Fight Solo or 2‑player Co‑op with your friends. Shoot through waves of enemy planes, dodge bullets, and master each Pacific theatre mission. Make it back safe to the carrier!

title: Swordcery Demo
description: A colossal blade has pierced the Earth, unleashing a storm of enchanted swords from the heavens. Collect and wield an arsenal of these spellbound blades, turning them against the very force that summoned them. In this roguelike ARPG, you will defy the Celestial evil consuming the world!

title: Pucked Up Demo
description: Welcome to the Pucked Up demo! Take your team through a 10 game regular season and see if you have what it takes to make the playoffs...

title: Wizard Balls Demo
description: A game about bouncing balls. Get upgrades and unique types of balls to throw into an arena to defeat enemies. Use spells to mess with your balls in this chaotic physics sim game.

title: AI守护天使 AI Eternal Companion Demo
description: The AIs from your phone suddenly appear right beside you—and it seems a conflict has broken out between them. In the game, DeepSeek—once a cooperative AI partner—suddenly turns rogue due to an unknown anomaly, becoming a force that disrupts the balance of the world.

title: Spaceman's Luck Demo
description: Do you have a Spaceman's Luck? A space strategy game.

title: Typecraft Demo
description: Every keystroke is a spell! This is a typing tower defense game. In the apocalyptic sanctuary, type the ancient sacred words swiftly and precisely to unleash defensive magic, and withstand the relentless waves of apocalyptic monsters.

title: Cargo Lines Demo
description: Build a bustling railway network and juggle cargo transport in real time. New stations appear, the flow of goods shifts constantly, deadlines loom, and trains collide if you don't keep your eyes on them. Keep your cool and master the chaos as orders pile up, and every second counts.

title: 49DAYS Demo
description: Become the host of an afterlife teahouse. For 49 days, serve the final cup to the departed. Experience a deep brewing system based on authentic traditions. Listen to the secrets of unique spirits, change their fates, and face the truth of your forgotten past.

title: Craft & Deliver Demo
description: Run your own cozy garage workshop—craft handmade products, prepare customer orders, and deliver them to your neighbors while growing your small business.

title: Flecto Demo
description: Flecto is a puzzle game where you place blocks in order to deflect bullets and shatter targets. Strategically use your tiles to split bullets, bounce them around each level, and destroy every target.

title: Trigonometric Equations Demo
description: Trigonometric Equations is a strict side-scrolling rhythm game. Solve the trigonometric equations to fly through fleeting points and curves perfectly!

title: Bannerlings Demo
description: Bannerlings is a strategy roguelike auto battler where you recruit, fuse, and customize units with emblems to build powerful synergies and overcome escalating, randomized encounters.

title: Driving Test Simulator Demo
description: Test your driving skills by completing challenging driving tests and precise, skill-based scenarios.

title: Ancient Adventure Demo
description: Venture forth! Evil has taken over the world. Equip your Weapon of Choice and venture forth. Journey out into the world to avenge your predecessors. Survive the hordes of monsters, seek out to extinguish the source of all Evil, so that one day, your people may finally live in peace.

title: Catapulteers Demo
description: A chaotic 1–4 player co-op physics comedy where cursed Catapulteers haul weird ammo, lose their heads, load one giant catapult, and stop a Troll that really hates catapults.

title: COLORFLY Demo
description: What answers are waiting for the main character "woo-ri" as we venture out to find our own color?

title: ArcaneBound Demo
description: ArcaneBound is a pixel-art bullet heaven action RPG. Collect familiars, defeat hordes of monsters, gather rare cards, level up, and create increasingly devastating builds.

title: Coralium Demo
description: 2.5D single player platformer demo game about a baby coral exploring a reef. In this demo you will use classic platformer mechanics like jumping, dashing and climbing. This time you will make sure to remain underwater because going out will make you run out of oxygen.

title: Knock Again Demo
description: This is not a normal clicker. It’s a psychological horror game where mechanical progress hides something dark, twisted, and unsettling. Knock on the door to earn money, upgrade your abilities, and keep knocking. It all seems simple… until it isn’t.

title: Barely Alive Demo
description: A co-op survival party game. Hunt your friends or survive until sunrise.

title: General Tactics: An Shi Rebellion Demo
Auto Battle Girl Demo
description: “Auto Battle Girl” is an auto chess game on Goll Continent where powerful female creatures battle. Strategic gameplay, upgrade maidens, activate faction bonuses, and use leader assistance to conquer this mystical land.

title: Tower Realm Demo
developer: Charge Piggy Studio , Charge Piggy Studio

title: Cemetery Simulator (Demo)
description: A DEMO coffin means the cheapest pine one! Grow your own forest cemetery alone or with friends. First, tidy up the place, then grab a shovel, dig your first grave, and organize a funeral. See who among you is the best at shoveling and tombstone care!

title: Retail Rivals Demo
description: Build your retail empire inside a shopping mall. Open multiple stores, sabotage rivals, and play solo or with up to 8 players. Choose different match objectives or play endless mode and compete for retail domination.
developer: DreamStudios, Ezernia Studios, Sandstorm in a Bottle

title: Eternal Dread Demo
description: Eternal Dread is a Medieval Dark Fantasy Horror game. You wake up in a dungeon. Everyone is gone. Have your premonitions finally come true? You must use what you can find around you to survive.

title: Mall Together Demo
description: Run your mall. Open new stores, sign contracts with leading brands, hire teammates, and meet customer needs. Play with friends or go solo, and enjoy the growth of your mall. You can open two stores in this demo version.

title: Frontier: Path of Shadows Demo
description: Fight enemies, upgrade your squad, and explore new planets! Make tough choices and shape the fate of an entire sector in Frontier: Path of Shadows Demo. Experience a richly crafted 25th-century world and tactical combat where X-COM meets Final Fantasy.

title: HellSlave II: Judgment of the Archon Demo
description: The Heavens are done waiting. In this dark fantasy dungeon crawler RPG, the Archon descends to end the demon war once and for all. Make your stand in HellSlave II, more immersive, brutal, and customizable than ever. The reckoning begins now.

title: Up-Beat!! Demo
description: Up-Beat!! is an action-packed boxing game heavily inspired by Punch-Out!! - take on the first 4 fights of the intro circuit in this tough-as-nails demo of the game!

title: Dry Meadow Demo
description: Fight, sneak & scavenge your way through the first level of Dry Meadow. Light fires, drink vodka and smoke cigarettes in shaky hideouts.

title: Swish Ball Clicker Demo
description: A cute, pixel-art, incremental basketball idler that every click is a swish. Automate your shots, upgrade your players, and go from being rookie to an ALL-STAR in this relaxing 2D indie baller. Perfect game to keep open in the background while you work.

title: ONE SKILL - Drive or Fall Demo
description: Test your skills on various platforms and obstacles built high in the sky! Master your driving as you maneuver through thrilling challenges and perilous situations to reach the finish line.

title: Orc Incremental Demo
description: Start with a single orc and build an unstoppable dark army to conquer the realms in this incremental auto battler. Perfect your formation, summon mighty beasts, unlock powerful upgrades, and grow stronger with each rebirth.

title: Human: Profit Demo
description: An accurate depiction of our world, baked into a short, classic incremental game. Take over Grandpa's farm, rebuild the town, and do whatever it takes to succeed. Also rabbits.

title: Cultivation Realm: Card Survival Demo
description: Cultivation Realm: Card Survival Demo is a cultivation survival game built around card-based interactions. Trapped in a mysterious realm that drains your lifespan but brims with spirit power, you must cultivate, survive, fight, and find a way to escape.

title: Medium Chronicles: Room 644 Demo
description: You must speak to survive. But speaking might kill you. Whisper rituals into your microphone — while a demon hunts every sound you make.

title: The Goddess's Will Demo
description: Dive into a 2.5D isometric action RPG adventure inspired by late-90s and early-00s classics. Face cunning enemy factions, explore a layered world filled with vivid characters, mythic stories, and handcrafted environments. Immerse yourself in a dangerous and unforgiving golden age of power fantasy.

title: 纸上征服者 Demo
description: this game apart is that it abandons hexagonal and quadrilateral plots and adopts more realistic borderlines. This part is entirely hand-drawn. The game plot involves playing as a commander in World War II and capturing all ene plots within 20 rounds. Game duration: each level lasts 5 min...

title: Vocal Horror Stories - Gaja Demo
description: The first episode of a voice-sensitive episodic horror game, in which you play as Shivani, a young woman battling with phonophobia. Why did her mother go missing? Who is the elephant-headed entity she keeps seeing? Can you speak to him?

title: The Sound of Piano Demo
description: A hardcore keyboard rhythm game featuring pure piano tracks. Every note you hit generates a real key sound for a true piano response. Designed for intermediate players and beyond, use our unique skill test algorithm to discover your rating. No AI-generated music, just raw human-crafted tracks.

title: Dice Rogues Demo
description: Dice Rogues is a tactical roguelite with infinite possibilities where you upgrade your dice and harness unpredictable rogue faces (X2, baguette, croissant, etc.) to bend fate, outplay the House, and survive a new roll each run.

title: 你予我的羽翼和星辰 -Your Astrum, My Alae- Demo
Life of a Cockroach Demo
description: Yes, you’re a cockroach, so your top priority now is to survive. Explore an urban environment from a whole new perspective in this open-world 3D adventure filled with challenges, tasks, and dangers. Discover hidden places, master your skills, and become the ultimate survivor insect!

title: Tokioriki Demo
description: After a strange dream, high school student Kanata Tanaka notices small cracks in his ordinary life. This demo covers the prologue to the first half of Chapter 1, introducing limited after-school time, map exploration, diary choices, and the first shadow of a story where you cannot choose everything.

title: Quack Quack Up Demo
description: A voice-controlled party game that will leave you and your friends breathless! Drop the controller —use your screams to herd the ducks to the finish line! Just watch out... a single unexpected outburst could send the hapless flock careening off a cliff!

title: Abyss Ring Demo
description: Survive, cook, and conquer!Cook monsters to stave off hunger in this roguelike as you reach the deepest floor. With 200+ equipment items and random dungeons, every run offers endless possibilities.

title: Gravitten Demo
description: Play the free demo! Take control of Gravitten, the gravity-defying kitten, and master the environment's shifting physics. Journey through 2 of the 5 distinct biomes available in the full game, manipulating gravity and perspective to solve intricate puzzles.

title: Bullet Spell Demo
description: Dodge, weave, and coordinate your way through bullets and enemies in this magical spy-thriller! Stress-test your ability to multitask by controlling the twin sisters Aurora and Solana simultaneously, or share control with a second player to coordinate the twins' survival.

title: Anomalous Object Demo
description: Trapped in a sealed security office, you must search every corner to find and identify hidden 'anomalous object'. Use limited clues and equipment to uncover their nature. Be careful—while you observe them, they are also watching you.

title: Hypnos Demo
description: Locked in a Case, the player meets the Key. Wanting to find a way out, he immerses himself in What’s In Me, where his decisions change what is happening, bringing him closer to or further from the search for the mysterious Source.

title: D-BEAT HEROES Demo
description: D-BEAT HEROES is a grid-based tag-team action RPG! Choose powerful abilities to take with you into combat and fight against your enemies on the grid! Protect Daylight City from the forces of evil and maintain order. Do it before it's too late!

title: 漂流彼岸 Demo
description: A nameless boy, in seek of a better afterlife, decides to drift to the end of the world. He will sail a boat, venture into a dark and dangerous yet wonderfully diverse world, and use his harpoon to deal with troubles along the way.

title: Unholy Employer Simulator (Demo)
description: You owe the devil money. Lots of it. You need to pay it back in 666 days or he will drag your soul down to hell.Things you'll be doing for your business:Make money.Sort out your problematic employees.Sacrifice your employees.Bribe the cops.Keep your wife happy.Keep your employee's wife happy (in bed).Stay sane (or not).Make more money.

title: 60病　The 60-Second Syndrome Demo
description: You will die in 60 seconds. This is a single-player horror escape game in which a man trapped within a 60-second time loop must escape from a sealed room. Inside the locked room, time resets every time you die. Observe repeating phenomena, remember the changes, and break free from the loop.

title: No One Returns Demo
description: Have you ever wondered what happens if you wake up and everyone is simply gone? No One Returns is a third-person survival horror game. Play as Denis, search a chillingly silent city for clues about your missing family while fighting the frightening zombies swarming the streets.

title: Catastrophic Demo
description: Unleash feline mayhem in this 3D bullet heaven! Control adorable chibi kittens with unique ultimate abilities and survive waves of enemies. With a limited inventory of only 3 weapons and 3 passive items, your strategy is everything. Try the demo and start purring!

title: Cloud Country Demo
description: An action rogue-lite adventure where you battle through random levels, level up and upgrade your weapons while unlocking new items and characters to defeat the witch threatening Cloud Country.

title: PlanetMars3D: Spirit Mission Demo
description: Explore Mars in 3D through real Pancam photographs from NASA's Spirit rover. Glide between images with detail that sharpens as you approach, and skim thousands of rover photos at a glance — manual mode, slideshow, or automated flythrough. Photo credit: JPL / NASA / Cornell / ASU

title: Ripple Park Demo
description: You are lost in a vast and eerie labyrinth filled with pools and puzzles. Gather items to activate various mechanisms as you explore further. Face various unknown entities that lurk within. Unravel the mysteries of the labyrinth and your own identity to find your way out. Inspired by poolcore.

title: Cages: Hidden Worlds Demo
description: This is the Demo of Cages: Hidden Worlds, an immersive first-person puzzle escape game, where every sound, shadow, and mechanism bring an eerie sense of mystery and impending doom. Solve the workings of complex, original machinery you’ve never seen before and uncover the secrets buried inside them.

title: Burn With Me Demo
description: Burn With Me is a story-centric deckbuilder filled with cozy dread and occultic mysteries. In order to summon a Personal Demon you'll master inventive gameplay with position-based synergies, and permanently burn your cards and your soul.

title: Sea You Around Demo
description: The sea is a gamble—how well do the gods favor you? Command a fleet of monster hunters in a Roulette-lite tactical RPG where your ships are the balls and the boss is the wheel. Manipulate the winds, manage your crew, and bet your life against the Colossi to reclaim a world drowned in Miasma.

title: Tears of Sulfuria Demo
description: Tears of Sulfuria is an emotional visual novel about two sisters in a dark fantasy world that rejects them. Marília and Adka must survive at any cost—and their choices may scar Sulfuria itself. Sacrifice yourself, lose your sanity, and do the unforgivable to move forward.

title: Unshelved Demo
description: Unshelved is an up to 4-player co-op Work-Life Horror Sim where you manage a cursed library. By day, handle book requests and earn an honest living. But as night falls, you must return books to their shelves and survive the horrors that haunt the halls!

title: Secho Demo
description: Secho — мрачный экшен-рогалик. Вы слепы. Чтобы видеть, вы должны издавать звук. Плати за удары собственным здоровьем, вычисляй истинные цели по цвету сердца. Следуй указаниям Белого Котла — твоего единственного наставника в этой пустоте.

title: Playful Pursuit Demo
description: Playful Pursuit is a colorful 3D adventure platformer where you jump, climb, solve puzzles, battle goofy enemies, collect VHS tapes, and build friendships with allies in a silly High Desert quest to rescue Eddy’s stolen teddy bear.

title: Master of Chaos: Beat or Break the Game Demo
description: Pulverize your enemies for underestimating this cute little wizard by counter attacks, deflecting projectiles, unleashing face-melting ultimate abilities and building insane combos boosting your power until you are strong enough to beat the boss or break the game - Either way you win.

title: Packed Lair Demo
description: You are an evil lord with a hero problem and not nearly enough floor space. Draft buildings, pack them into your cramped lair, toil to earn money to expand, create powerful monster synergies, and send your chaotic army of minions to repel wave after wave of heroic do-gooder pests.
